heading: Art. 102. Forcing a safeguard
label: 902 Art. 102. Forcing a safeguard
text: Any person subject to this chapter who forces a safeguard shall suffer death or such other punishment as a court-martial may direct.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)90250:696.(Art. 102), .May 5, 1950, ch. 169, § 164 Stat. 137
